text:
As siggins@nai.net wrote:

> Booting 0:Fd(0,a) /Kernel @ 0x27d000
> text 0x10d000
> ERROR: D:0x0 C:1 H:1 S:3
> Continues on down screen.. Then spinning cursor (like it's looking for 

Your floppy is dead, on cylinder 1, head 1, sector 3.

But you knew this already, didn't you? :)
